items.title: What is Magoo?
items.body: A library of CSS-less skeleton UI components whose primary consumer is an AI agent.

items.title: How does generation work?
items.body: A single canonical source per component emits SDC, React, Vue, and Storybook.

items.title: How is it themed?
items.body: All themes share one fixed set of CSS-variable names; only the values differ.
